meta.note: Routes fixed weekly DCA capital dynamically into the universe asset closest to its nearest active (unmitigated) weekly bullish order block. Each week: sells out of any held position that has closed 20% or more below the price it was last bought at (stop-loss); sells a position that's up 10%+ from its last buy price if it then pulls back 15%+ from its post-purchase high (trailing stop, protects profits, deferred until it's been held over 366 days to preserve the AU 12-month CGT discount); and skips a candidate for that week's buy if it already exceeds 15% of the strategy's portfolio value, routing capital to the next-best opportunity instead.

strategyLegs.label: Pure Proximity
strategyLegs.description: Unfiltered -- buys whichever candidate is closest to its nearest active bullish order block, no trend confirmation required.

strategyLegs.label: Guppy Filtered
strategyLegs.description: Requires a Guppy multi-EMA stack (short EMA above a rising, stacked long-EMA group) to confirm an established uptrend before entering.

strategyLegs.label: 200-Day Trend Filtered
strategyLegs.description: Requires price to be trading above its own 40-week (~200-day) moving average -- the classic trend-following rule ("never buy below the 200-day MA") many professional trend-followers use to avoid entering during a primary downtrend.

strategyLegs.label: Bullish Structure Filtered
strategyLegs.description: Requires the SMC swing market structure itself (higher highs / higher lows, from engine.py's own structure detection) to be bullish before entering -- a market-structure confirmation professional/discretionary SMC traders check before taking a long-term position.
